_comment: Declarative metric metadata for RD Gauntlet telemetry/result columns. Pattern-matched against metric_name (regex, first match wins, top to bottom) so it works across devices without hardcoding per-SoC column names (CPU core count, thermal zone names, etc. all vary per device -- see telemetry-monitor.sh). Modeled on the Phoronix Test Suite test-profile schema's Proportion/ResultScale/ResultQuantifier vocabulary (pts-core/openbenchmarking.org/schemas/test-profile.xsd) -- see docs/result-schema-conventions.md for the full rationale and citations. proportion values: HIB (higher is better), LIB (lower is better), ABSTRACT (no inherent direction / context-dependent -- do not colorize as good/bad in charts).

definitions.label: Frame rate
definitions.notes: From Parse-PerfettoSurfaceFps.py or future FPS-capture sources. Not currently a telemetry.csv column.

definitions.label: CPU core frequency
definitions.notes: Sustained clock under a fixed workload is a reasonable proxy for 'not thermal throttling' -- this is a project convention, not a universal truth (idle/low-load frequency is not meaningfully 'better' higher). Column name varies by core count per device.

definitions.label: CPU utilization
definitions.notes: High utilization can mean either 'using the hardware well' or 'CPU-bound bottleneck' depending on context -- do not colorize as good/bad without the paired FPS result.

definitions.label: GPU busy percentage
definitions.notes: Same ambiguity as CPU utilization -- only available on Adreno (kgsl) and legacy Mali paths per telemetry-monitor.sh; absent on many devices (e.g. open-source Panfrost/Freedreno drivers under Linux CFW -- see docs/coverage-gaps-research.md section 6).

definitions.label: GPU frequency
definitions.notes: Same sustained-clock-under-load convention as CPU frequency above.

definitions.label: Fan PWM duty cycle
definitions.notes: Lower commanded fan effort for the same workload/ambient implies less thermal stress. Only present on devices with a PWM-driven fan and no RPM sensor.

definitions.label: Fan speed
definitions.notes: Only present on devices with an RPM-reporting fan (most handhelds are fanless).

definitions.label: Temperature
definitions.notes: Covers battery temp and all thermal-zone columns (zone names/counts vary per device -- see telemetry-monitor.sh zone auto-discovery).

definitions.label: Battery current
definitions.notes: Sign convention (charge vs discharge) is not normalized across all devices/kernels -- treat as informational, not directly comparable across devices without manual sign-checking.

definitions.label: Battery level
definitions.notes: An averaged snapshot over the test window is not a drain rate. For actual battery-life comparison, compute the delta of batt_charge_counter_uah across the run instead of using this average.

definitions.label: Battery charge counter
definitions.notes: Raw coulomb-counter snapshot. Comparable across runs on the same device as a delta (start-of-run minus end-of-run); the plain average reported here is informational only. Also degraded/inaccurate on some low-end SoCs -- see docs/coverage-gaps-research.md section 6.
